rows.label: qev050905_MSG0001
rows.name:
As expected...
You are incredibly strong...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050905_MSG0002
rows.name:
Could it be...
Are you the Earthling BLADE who is said
to have defeated Ga Derg-sama?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050905_MSG0003
rows.name:
No, clinging to such past battle records
is merely proof of my own weakness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050905_MSG0004
rows.name: I have no excuses to offer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050905_MSG0005
rows.name:
However...
Even so, I feel as though I have somewhat
grasped the essence of combat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050905_MSG0006
rows.name: I do not want to forget this sensation![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050905_MSG0007
rows.name:
What do you say? Could I ask for another match,
this time using Dolls?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050905_MSG0008
rows.name:
Right now, I feel I can apply this sensation
I've nearly grasped to piloting a Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050905_MSG0009
rows.name:
We obviously cannot have a Doll battle here,
so we will have to move somewhere a bit further away, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050905_MSG0010
rows.name:
Please!
Allow me one more match...![ST:wait ]
